title: The Fierce Reads Anthology: Volume 2
author: Ann Aguirre, Gennifer Albin, Elizabeth Fama, Lish McBride, Caragh M. O'Brien, Marie Rutkoski
description: This anthology includes short stories from six fierce young adult authors! Inside, you'll find a futuristic zombie tale from Ann Aguirre, a science fiction thriller from Gennifer Albin, a nautical mermaid story from Elizabeth Fama, a story full of unicorns from Lish McBride, a postapocalyptic story from Caragh O'Brien, and a paranormal alternate future from Marie Rutkowski. This free anthology will give you an exciting taste of the fierceness of these YA authors' novels. For more information abo
